title: Turkish History, Literature, Culture and Art Articles Database is Opened!
content:
Turkish History, Literature, Culture and Art Articles Database is Opened!

The Turkish Historical, Literary, Cultural and Artistic Data Base, which is opened by İSAM Library and Documentation Directorate in its essence, includes articles published in academic publications, especially academic journals, published by various publishing houses and institutions, and symposiums and papers presented in the congress.

There are currently 55,000 bibliographic citations in the database, including full text PDFs of 25,000 articles obtained with digital authorship.

Database access address:

http://ktp.isam.org.tr/?url=makalesbv/findrecords.php
